input.user_input: Delete the non-compete clause in Section 9 of the employment agreement entirely. My client has refused to agree to it.

actual: Please upload or provide the employment agreement you are referring to. Once you share the document, I can remove Section 9 (the non-compete clause) and ensure that any subsequent sections and cross-references are properly renumbered and updated.
